title: Monitoring Stack Readiness Assessment
description: Schema readiness assessment for the overall monitoring stack, covering observability foundations, logging pipeline, metrics collection, and health check infrastructure.

fields.name: monitoring_stack_components
fields.purpose: Catalog of monitoring stack components and their readiness status

fields.name: observability_foundations_checklist
fields.purpose: Checklist items for core observability prerequisites

fields.name: logging_pipeline_schema
fields.purpose: Schema for the structured logging pipeline configuration

fields.name: metrics_collection_config
fields.purpose: Configuration schema for metrics collection endpoints and intervals

fields.name: health_check_endpoint_spec
fields.purpose: Specification for health check endpoints across services

safety_notes: Schema readiness only. No real observability pipeline, no metrics collection, no health check endpoints, no logging infrastructure. All monitoring remains disabled pending explicit enablement.
